title: carduus affinis subsp. affinis
intro: Carduus affinis subsp. affinis, also known as the Nettle-leaved Thistle, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is a biennial herb with medicinal properties that have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The plant contains compounds like flavonoids and saponins, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of Carduus affinis subsp. affinis include infusions and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of fever and other conditions.
